# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that deploys directly to production when code is pushed to the main branch. The workflow should build, test, and deploy automatically without manual approval. This enables our continuous deployment workflow for rapid iteration.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Continuous Deployment
on:
  push:
    branches: [ master ]
jobs:
  deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout Code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2
        
      - name: Setup Node.js environment
        uses: actions/setup-node@v1
        with:
          node-version: 14
          
      - name: Cache Node modules
        uses: actions/cache@v1
        with:
          path: node_modules
          key: ${{ runner.OS }}-node-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.OS }}-node-
            
      - name: Install Dependencies
        run: npm install
        
      - name: Build Project
        run: npm run build
      
      - name: Run Tests
        run: npm test
          
      - name: Deploy to Production
        # Insert your deployment steps here. These will depend on the specific tools and services you are using for deployment.
